description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box constructed from dark brown planks arranged horizontally, forming sturdy side walls and a flat base. The box is open at the top, with no visible lid or cover, and the interior is spacious, suitable for holding various items. The wood grain texture is visible, giving it a rustic and robust appearance, and the planks are evenly spaced with slight gaps between them. The corners are reinforced with thicker vertical wooden posts, enhancing structural integrity. There are no visible handles, locks, or decorative elements, and the surfaces appear unfinished or matte. This type of box is commonly used for outdoor storage, gardening, or as a planter in urban environments.
description: A large, open-topped rectangular wooden storage box made of dark brown planks with reinforced corners and a rustic finish.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the open top, horizontal plank construction, and reinforced corners.
description_view_1: Side angled view highlighting the depth of the box and the uniform plank arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to the front, emphasizing the open interior and sturdy build.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the box's depth and the consistent wooden plank design.
